title: Hunting: Logon Anomaly - Account Activity Profiling
description: Profiles user account activity across Windows Security Events using the parsed 'Target User Name' field: total logons, unique hosts authenticated to, explicit credential delegations (4648), privilege assignments (4672), and failed-logon ratio (4625). Surfaces accounts with many hosts, high delegation, or high failure rate.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' in ('4624', '4625', '4648', '4672') and not 'Target User Name' = 'ANONYMOUS LOGON' and not 'Target User Name' like '%$' | eval IsFailure = if('Event ID' = '4625', 1, 0) | eval IsExplicit = if('Event ID' = '4648', 1, 0) | eval IsPrivilege = if('Event ID' = '4672', 1, 0) | stats count as TotalEvents, sum(IsFailure) as Failures, sum(IsExplicit) as ExplicitCreds, sum(IsPrivilege) as PrivilegeAssigns, distinctcount(Entity) as UniqueHosts by 'Target User Name' | eval FailRate = round(Failures * 100 / TotalEvents, 1) | where UniqueHosts > 2 or ExplicitCreds > 10 or FailRate > 20 | sort -UniqueHosts
